subject: Re: Prentice Capital's 3rd Quarter 2006 Letter CRM:00100006
body:
why is since inception relevant?

----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, October 20, 2006 4:52:27 PM
Subject: Prentice Capital's 3rd Quarter 2006 Letter CRM:00100006



---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Michael Zimmerman <MichaelZ@prenticecapital.com>

Date: Oct 20, 2006 4:44 PM
Subject: Prentice Capital's 3rd Quarter 2006 Letter CRM:00100006
To: 


I have attached to this email Prentice Capital's quarterly letter for the quarter ended September 30, 2006.  For an investor who invested in Prentice Capital Partners QP, LP at inception, gross returns on total capital for the Third Quarter of 2006 and Since Inception on May 2, 2005  were 
0.53% and 25.03%, respectively.

 

I hope that, if you are passing through New York in the near future, you will stop by to visit us.

 

Best regards,

 

Michael

 

 

Michael Zimmerman
PRENTICE
 CAPITAL 
MANAGEMENT, 
LP
623 Fifth Avenue -- 32nd Floor
New York, NY 10022

Phone: 212-756-8048

E-mail: 
michaelz@prenticecapital.com
